text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm enjoying a relaxing walk through a park when I
come across Curren Chan feeding ducks at a
pond.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
There you go. Eat up now, my cute little
duckies! ♪ You need to show everyone on
Umastagram just how cute you are!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Oh. Is that who I think it is?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hiii, Brian! ♪ Want to feed the duckies with me?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Duck feeding? I'm good. I'm just passing through.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah? But you kinda look like you've got time
on your hands...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: That's not really any of your business...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Come on! You might find that you like it if you
give it a try. I even have permission from the
groundskeeper to do this all day! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Come on, Brian! Join in! It'll be fuuun! ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh, fine. If it'll shut you up.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Eat up already! It's food!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
What the hell? It's like they're specifically
avoiding my food.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh, you can't make a face like that.
You're scaring the poor little duckies.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch, why do I have to worry about that? I'm the
one feeding them.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but the duckies probably think you're up to
no good. You have to let them know you just
wanna be friends.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I've got some yummy food over here! Dig in,
everyone! ♪ Nom nom nom nom! ♪

text_block_list.name: Ducks
text_block_list.text: Quack, quack!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: See, just like that! ♪ Now you try! ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Like hell I will!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps frightened by Narita Brian's angry
outburst, the ducks begin to take flight...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Stop right there!

text_block_list.name: Ducks
text_block_list.text: Quack?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Okay, you little brats... Do you really got the guts
to not only ignore me, but to fly off without
eating?

text_block_list.name: Ducks
text_block_list.text: Q-quack...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Get back here and line up... That's right, one at a
time. Now take your food.
choice_data_list: (I wonder if that's a bit too intimidating...)
(I wonder if that's a bit too intimidating...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Get back here and line up... That's right, one at a
time. Now take your food.
choice_data_list: (I wonder if that's a bit too intimidating...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, piece of cake. I should've done this from
the start.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Holy quackamole! Look how nicely they're lined
up! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oooh! ♪ I've just got to upload this to Umastagram! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Narita Brian manages to feed the ducks
in her own unique way.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
For crying out loud... Do I really have to get this
ticked off before you lot will eat?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hm... Something about them feels off, though.

text_block_list.name: Ducks
text_block_list.text: Q-quack...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While the ducks are taking the food, they seem
to be literally too frightened to swallow it.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Brian! You need to turn down the intensity a
notch or two!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: A-are you kidding me? Stupid ducks...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... Looks like that was the easiest way to do
it after all.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Okay, they ate everything. Sheesh, bunch of
pains in my—

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Brian! Behind you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I turn to find the flock of ducks has smartly
submitted to Narita Brian and is now following
their new alpha hen.

text_block_list.name: Ducks
text_block_list.text: Quack!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Scram!
